reviews.review_description: You romp around a colorful house and theres a pet and little objectives.
I got to what I believe is the end.. Put the gems in the eyes.. Will there be more? P.s. plate is in front of the fox!
Do not download. Too many up down, up down pointless tasks. This will make your head hurt. I would give 0 stars if was allowed.
It only lets me play chapter 1 then it like completely freezes.
I clicked on the link to the website and naked women from Asia looking for dates and romance. I'm thinking this game has been abandoned. Click on developer then hit this link www.521vr.com
Too slow (I noticed changes in frame rate on a S7!), too buggy, too boring, too nonsensical (in a bad way) and short. Perhaps it could be worse by being longer!
I do all it tells me to, but then I put the stones in the eyes of the stone head and it says To Be Continued...... but still so far kinda neat
Its so amazing. Its like an adventure that seems real but when you take tje oculus off you wish it was real

I can't wait for this series to expand, and the gameplay alone is awesome for virtual reality. However, it has no story, and ends after just a short time of playing. It is straight-forward with no different paths and no options, but it has a lot of room to grow and I believe this app will do well. (This style of gameplay is also a huge reason I bought a VR headset, thank you for being a first-person game!)

I played this on the Oculus GO. The game, when it works, seems like it could be fun, but this demo is very buggy. Often I can't start the game from the menu. Having completed the (artificially and annoyingly slow) first part I couldn't then use the menu to start from the second part. I had to quit and reload the game several time and then it would let me start from scratch. I then had to play it all the way through in one go. Also there are places in part 2 where you can walk off the edge of the land and you just fall and you have to quit the game.

If they put some more work in to this it could be fun.
